title: friend craft
description: when create and timeless classics come together.
body:
This modpack features mods such as create, timeless and classics. This modpack is a imalgamation for all my favorite mods to create a semi-semi-vanilla gameplay expierence.

Major Mods Included:
Create (plus addons)
Timeless and Classics
Alex Caves/Mobs
Silent Gear
Trial Chambers.

You can do things from carpet nuke a village to bring an RPG into a Trial Chamber.

I recommend 4gb of ram.
dont copy this modpack pls
